hero.headline: Stories that stay with you
hero.subheadline: Lifestyle photography, atmospheric Reels, and premium photo albums in Freiburg, Basel, and Baden-Baden.

about.title: About
about.body:
I care for your feelings through the lens and the page. My name is Viktoria, and I create visual stories: vibrant photography, atmospheric Reels, and premium photo books. My shooting geography is Freiburg, Basel, and Baden-Baden.

For me, photography is more than a pretty picture. It is a way to pause time and keep the most genuine emotions. I believe every story is unique, so I offer a full-service approach: I help you find the perfect location, set a relaxed mood on set, film elegant short videos for your Instagram, and design the strongest frames into a printed album you'll want to touch again and again.

We can pick a location that matches your mood. It can be the urban aesthetic and architecture of Freiburg, Basel, or Baden-Baden, ideal for stylish walks, coffee on terraces, and elegant frames. Or the cinematic nature of the Black Forest — Lake Titisee and Lake Schluchsee, with their still water, evergreen forests, and soft light for the most romantic stories.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: A few session formats to make things easy for you.

mini.name: Mini
bullets: Consultation and help with location and outfit
30 photos with signature color grading and light retouch

atmosphere.name: Atmosphere
bullets: Edited Reels clip, 15—30 seconds, with music

books.title: Photo Books
books.body:
I am deeply convinced that photographs should not live only on a phone, so I design premium photo books that become true family heirlooms. You can order a book to go with any of our sessions, or fill it with your own archive shots. I take full responsibility for the design and layout, and we discuss every detail to bring the album to perfection.

These books stand out for their exceptional quality: Lay Flat binding opens flat at 180°, satin or glossy paper is used, and the covers are made of premium fabric, eco-leather, or a Soft Touch finish with optional personal embossing. Design and printing are quoted separately for your request, and the finished piece is delivered in person.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.body: Let's create something beautiful together! To book a date, tell me a little about your idea: what kind of session you need and which city you are in. You can message me directly, and I will get back to you within a day.
